# Synapse

> A React component library built with TypeScript and Vite, token-matched to a Figma design system.
> Package: `@niravbhatt/mdt-design-system`
> Storybook: https://synapse.heynirav.com
> Figma: https://www.figma.com/design/A8iOt3oQHHT20N1mSpxnQ1/Components--Copy-

## Installation

```bash
npm install @niravbhatt/mdt-design-system
```

Import the stylesheet once at your app entry point:

```tsx
import '@niravbhatt/mdt-design-system/styles'
```

## Components

### Button

A multi-variant, accessible button component. Supports all interactive states, icon slots, loading, and skeleton states.

```tsx
import { Button } from '@niravbhatt/mdt-design-system'
```

#### Props

| Prop           | Type                                                     | Default     | Description                                              |
|----------------|----------------------------------------------------------|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| `variant`      | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'tertiary' \| 'neutral' \| 'link'` | `'primary'` | Visual style of the button                               |
| `size`         | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'`                 | `'sm'`      | Button size (height: 24/28/32/36/40px)                   |
| `loading`      | `boolean`                                                | `false`     | Shows spinner, disables interaction, sets `aria-busy`    |
| `skeleton`     | `boolean`                                                | `false`     | Renders a loading skeleton placeholder                   |
| `fullWidth`    | `boolean`                                                | `false`     | Stretches button to 100% container width                 |
| `iconOnly`     | `boolean`                                                | `false`     | Square icon-only layout; use `aria-label` for a11y       |
| `leadingIcon`  | `ReactNode`                                              | —           | Icon rendered before the label                           |
| `trailingIcon` | `ReactNode`                                              | —           | Icon rendered after the label                            |
| `disabled`     | `boolean`                                                | —           | Native disabled state                                    |

All standard `<button>` HTML attributes are also accepted via prop spread.

#### Usage examples

```tsx
// Basic variants
<Button variant="primary">Save</Button>
<Button variant="secondary">Cancel</Button>
<Button variant="tertiary">Learn more</Button>
<Button variant="neutral">Options</Button>
<Button variant="link">View details</Button>

// Sizes
<Button size="xs">XS</Button>
<Button size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button size="md">Medium</Button>
<Button size="lg">Large</Button>
<Button size="xl">XL</Button>

// With icons
<Button leadingIcon={<MyIcon />}>Download</Button>
<Button trailingIcon={<ChevronIcon />}>Next</Button>

// Icon only (always provide aria-label)
<Button iconOnly leadingIcon={<PlusIcon />} aria-label="Add item" />

// Loading state
<Button loading>Saving…</Button>

// Full width
<Button fullWidth>Submit</Button>

// Disabled
<Button disabled>Unavailable</Button>

// Skeleton placeholder
<Button skeleton size="md" />
```

#### Variant descriptions

- **primary** — High-emphasis action. Dark fill (`#07101f`). Use for the main CTA on a surface.
- **secondary** — Medium-emphasis. Bordered, transparent background. Use for secondary actions.
- **tertiary** — Low-emphasis. No border, subtle hover background. Use for supplementary actions.
- **neutral** — Neutral-tone fill. Use for neutral or cancel actions.
- **link** — Text-only, link-style appearance. Use for inline navigation or less prominent actions.

#### Loading behaviour

When `loading={true}`:
- The button is disabled and `aria-busy` is set.
- If `leadingIcon` is present, it is replaced with a spinner.
- If no icons are present, a spinner is prepended automatically.
- If `trailingIcon` is present, it is also replaced with a spinner.

#### Skeleton behaviour

When `skeleton={true}` the component renders a `<div role="presentation" aria-hidden="true">` with animated shimmer styles sized to the button's `size` and `iconOnly` props.

---

## Design Tokens

Tokens are exported as typed JS constants and also available as CSS custom properties via the stylesheet.

### Usage as JS constants

```tsx
import { colors, semantic, spacing, radii, fontSize } from '@niravbhatt/mdt-design-system'

colors.brand[600]     // '#2563eb'
spacing[4]            // '16px'
radii.md              // '8px'
```

### Color tokens

**Primitive palette**

| Token                  | Value     |
|------------------------|-----------|
| `colors.neutral[0]`    | `#ffffff` |
| `colors.neutral[100]`  | `#f5f5f5` |
| `colors.neutral[900]`  | `#171717` |
| `colors.brand[400]`    | `#60a5fa` |
| `colors.brand[600]`    | `#2563eb` |
| `colors.brand[700]`    | `#1d4ed8` |
| `colors.danger[500]`   | `#f43f5e` |
| `colors.success[500]`  | `#22c55e` |

**Semantic tokens (light theme)**

| Token                          | Value     |
|-------------------------------|-----------|
| `semantic.light['bg-default']` | `#ffffff` |
| `semantic.light['fg-default']` | `#171717` |
| `semantic.light['accent']`     | `#2563eb` |
| `semantic.light['danger']`     | `#f43f5e` |

**CSS custom properties** (set by the stylesheet on `:root` and `[data-theme]`)

```css
--color-bg-default
--color-bg-subtle
--color-fg-default
--color-fg-muted
--color-border-default
--color-accent
--color-accent-hover
--color-accent-fg
--color-danger
--color-danger-hover
--color-success
```

Dark mode: set `data-theme="dark"` on any ancestor element.

### Spacing scale (base-4, px)

| Token        | Value  |
|--------------|--------|
| `spacing[1]` | `4px`  |
| `spacing[2]` | `8px`  |
| `spacing[3]` | `12px` |
| `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| `spacing[6]` | `24px` |
| `spacing[8]` | `32px` |

### Border radii

| Token       | Value    |
|-------------|----------|
| `radii.sm`  | `4px`    |
| `radii.md`  | `8px`    |
| `radii.lg`  | `12px`   |
| `radii.full`| `9999px` |

### Typography

Font: **Inter** (loaded via `@fontsource/inter` at weights 400, 500, 600).

Button-specific typography CSS variables:

```css
--btn-font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif
--btn-font-weight: 500
--btn-xs-font-size: 12px   --btn-xs-line-height: 16px
--btn-sm-font-size: 13px   --btn-sm-line-height: 16px
--btn-md-font-size: 14px   --btn-md-line-height: 16px
--btn-lg-font-size: 14px   --btn-lg-line-height: 20px
--btn-xl-font-size: 14px   --btn-xl-line-height: 20px
```

---

## Theming

Apply the `data-theme` attribute to switch themes:

```html
<html data-theme="dark">…</html>
<!-- or on any subtree -->
<div data-theme="dark">…</div>
```

---

## Accessibility

- `Button` uses native `<button>` — keyboard focusable by default.
- `loading` sets `aria-busy="true"` and disables the element.
- `iconOnly` buttons require an `aria-label` (or visually-hidden children).
- Colour contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA on both light and dark themes.

---

## Package structure

```
dist/
  index.mjs          — ES module build
  index.cjs          — CommonJS build
  index.d.ts         — TypeScript declarations
  mdt-design-system.css — All component styles + tokens
```

## Peer dependencies

```json
"react": ">=17",
"react-dom": ">=17"
```
